# Lab 19 Cancer Mini-Project
Paige Contreras (A16850883)

> Q1.

download the sequences and move them to working project directory

ran a blastp search against refseq protein and set the taxid to homo
sapiens (taxid:9606)

-Official symbol: **ERBB2** -official Full Name: **name**

``` r
library(bio3d)
a <- read.fasta("A16850883_mutant_seq.fa")
```

``` r
a$id
```

    [1] "wt_healthy"   "mutant_tumor"

We can score conservation pre sequence position

> Q2.

``` r
s <- conserv(a)
which( s != 1)
```

    [1] 824 861 899

``` r
mutation_positions <- which(s != 1)
mutation_positions
```

    [1] 824 861 899

``` r
a$ali[, 824]
```

      wt_healthy mutant_tumor 
             "N"          "V" 

``` r
a$ali[, 861]
```

      wt_healthy mutant_tumor 
             "I"          "E" 

``` r
a$ali[, 899]
```

      wt_healthy mutant_tumor 
             "F"          "Y" 

Answer: N824V, I861E, F899Y

> Q3 We can use the HMMER at the EBI (if it works) to find this
> information ERBB2 or we can use uniprot

``` r
ref_seq <- a$ali[a$id == "wt_healthy", ]
ref <- paste(ref_seq, collapse = "")
cat(ref)
```
